description: This minimalistic email template is a powerful tool for non-profit organizations, especially those focusing on health and wellness, to communicate critical news and updates during the COVID-19 crisis. The light blue and white color scheme projects a sense of calm and protection, while the streamlined design ensures your message is clear and impactful. This template is ideal for sharing coronavirus prevention measures, wellness advice, or fundraising appeals to support your cause during these challenging times. Utilize this template to convey crucial information and to foster a sense of community resilience and unity.
short_description: Ideal for non-profit organizations in health and wellness sectors, this light blue and white minimalistic email template communicates crucial updates during the COVID-19 crisis. Perfect for sharing prevention measures, wellness advice, or fundraising appeals. Convey critical information and foster resilience.

designer.description:
My name is Andrea Dall'Ara and I'm a freelancer digital graphic designer.
I'm focused on UI design for websites, emails and applications, logo and icon design and digital illustration.

1 Help local businesses

Purchase gift cards from your restaurants & coffee shops that you normally eat & drink at.

READ MORE →
 
 

2 Support fundraising

We are all affected by the growing COVID-19 pandemic. It's an unprecedented health challenge and we know people and organizations everywhere want to help.

DONATE NOW →
 
 

3 Stay at home

Avoid close contact with people who are sick
and put distance between yourself and other people if COVID-19 is spreading in your community. This is especially important for people who are at higher risk of getting very sick.

STAY SAFE →
 

Stay up to date with Centers from Disease Control and Prevention's official website.
